text.title: Integration Testing Worked Example
text.summary: End-to-end example: Postgres rollback fixture + FastAPI client + respx external-API mock.

example.note: Session-scoped Postgres container, function-scoped rollback session (r1, r2).
FastAPI client with dependency override and explicit clear (r3); UUID factory for unique email (r5); respx mock for external API (r4, r-respx-pick).
Bad — mocks the SQLAlchemy session inside an "integration" test (r7 violation), and never clears dependency overrides (r3 violation).
example.code: def test_create_user_BAD(client, mocker): mocker.patch("app.main.Session", return_value=mocker.MagicMock()) # demoted to unit test app.dependency_overrides[get_db] = lambda: mocker.MagicMock() # ... no .clear() — leaks to next test
